app.name: A11yFred
app.tagline: Real horrorshow audit lovaas, my droog
about.what_heading: What Is This, O My Brothers?
about.what_body: This, O my brothers, is your humble malenky helper for accessibility audit-writing. If you've done a few, you've done them all — real horrorshow. If you've been doing this a while, you viddy how oft we encounter the same bolshy a11y problems over and over, yes?
about.what_body_2: Consistency is the horrorshow thing, especially in this jeezny. I wanted to save myself the rassoodock-work of digging through old platties and reports. Slooshy this homebrew library, sero the one that fits, and smot it straight into your audit report.
about.what_wcag: This data extends up to {wcag} (Level A and AA), real horrorshow.
about.step_1_body: Tece what you viddied — a component slovo, element type, or plain-jeezny description.
about.step_2_body: Use the Priority Up/Down arrows on each result to tune ranking. Elen to show first. Archive to hide.
about.step_3_body: Sero the finding that best matches, O my droog. Results are ranked by horrorshow relevance.
about.step_4_body: Add a location prefix (e.g. "Global:") or use AI to help revise the wording, real horrorshow.
about.step_5_body: Gein the description and suggested fix steps straight into your report, my droog.
about.feature_ai_body: Refine any finding with a short naughty note. Your API key, your AI — never stored server-side, O my brothers.
about.feature_languages_body: The UI is available in 50+ lovaas including RTL. Switch in Soviet.
about.feature_party_body: It's in Soviet. Under Silah. You'll viddy it when you see it, O my droog.
about.feature_a11y_body: Built to WCAG 2.2: focus management, live regions, keyboard navigation, reduced motion support — real horrorshow tokens.
about.sources_body: Entries are written in plain jeezny, near-duplicates consolidated, each aligned to a WCAG criterion. Sources slooshied include:
about.coming_auth: Optional sign-in with Google or GitHub to sync your Soviet across devices.
about.coming_custom: Add and edit your own custom findings, stored privately — real horrorshow.
about.coming_ai: Additional AI providers: OpenAI, Google Gemini, and more bolshy options.
search.label: Describe the finding, O my droog
search.placeholder: e.g. modal close button no label
search.hint_submit: Tece a description and press Slooshy or Enter.
search.hint_platform: Currently viddying {platform} issues, O my droog.
search.hint_voting: Prioritize results — elen results always appear first.
search.view_all_confirm_body: This will show {count} results on this single page, my droog.
search.hint_change_in: Disse Optschonen köönt ännert warrn in
results.vote_hint: Prioritize results up or down — a higher priority means it shows up higher. Elen to show first. Archive to hide. (Can be undone, my droog).
announce.starred: {title} starred — will appear first in relevant results, real horrorshow.
results.no_results_announce: No results for "{query}", O my brothers. Try a component slovo, element type, or a different jeezny phrase.
results.no_results_body: Try a component slovo, element type, or a different jeezny phrase.
detail.refine_hint_ai: Describe what to change and AI will rewrite — real horrorshow. Change your AI model or turn this off in
detail.refine_hint_no_ai: Use this space to keep note of whatever you would like, O my droog. Enable AI Epsë in
detail.refine_hint_no_ai_suffix: and it will rewrite based on your notes.
detail.refine_placeholder_ai: e.g. this is specific to mobile, element is a tooltip
detail.refine_placeholder_no_ai: Example: "Findings of ultra-bolshy severity like this are found throughout the Onboarding Flow, O my brothers."
detail.rewrite_aria: Save note and revise selected fields with AI
detail.nothing_to_copy_body: This field is pусто, O my droog. There is nothing to copy.
detail.confirm_reset_body: You've made bolshy changes to this text, O my droog. Resetting will remove all your edits.
detail.related_heading: Similar or related issues, O my brothers:
detail.copy_all_aria: Beschrieven un vörslaan Reparatur tosamen koperen
detail.copy_all_announce: Finding Details and Possible Remediation Steps copied, real horrorshow
detail.reset_all_fields_aria: Beschrieven un vörslahn Fix op de originalen Warden trüchsetten
detail.reset_all_fields_announce: Finding Details and Remediation Steps reset
detail.edit_lang_warning: Edits are session-only — switching lovaas or finding will reset them.
edit.target_dialog_body: You're editing a finding while viddying it in {locale}.
edit.save_as_personal_desc: Stored locally and private to you, O my droog. Other lovaas will be AI-translated — translations only run during site maintenance.
edit.contribute_desc: Your edit will be queued for the maintainer to viddy before it becomes part of the shared corpus.
edit.scope_all_langs_desc: Other lovaas will be re-translated from the updated English on the next translation pass.
edit.personal_ai_warning: Only {locale} will be saved. Other lovaas will show AI-translated text.
edit.en_switch_dialog_body: Your {locale} version is saved. Here's the English version — make any edits and save, or skip, O my droog.
edit.personal_saved: Saved to your personal entries, real horrorshow.
detail.revise_error_body: Something went bolshy wrong. Press Save & Revise to try again, O my droog.
detail.revise_error_invalid_key: Invalid or expired API key ({provider}). Check your Soviet.
detail.revise_error_rate_limit: Rate limit reached ({provider}). Wait a malenky moment and try again.
detail.revise_error_service_error: {provider} service error ({status}). Try again in a few minoota.
detail.revise_error_network_error: No internet connection, O my droog. Check your connection.
settings.heading: Soviet
settings.language_current_is: The current lovaas is {label}, O my droog.
settings.language_desc: Use the dropdown and Change button to select a new lovaas. The change won't be saved until you press Save.
settings.language_changed_announce: Lovaas: Changed, press Save to confirm
settings.voting_on: Sort Priority controls are visible on each result.
settings.ai_enable_desc: Rewrites text based on your refinement notes, real horrorshow.
settings.privacy_body_1: API keys are stored locally in your browser (localStorage) and sent only to the AI provider's own API — never to any server, O my brothers. You can clear them at any time.
settings.privacy_body_2: This app stores the following: your theme preference, your lovaas preference, your platform filter, your live slooshy setting, your active AI provider, one API key per provider, your finding voting data, recently viewed finding IDs, any findings you create, and the ID of the last finding you had open.
settings.privacy_body_translations: UI translations were generated with AI and may contain bolshy errors. No custom data is ever sent out for translation.
settings.api_key_error: Strack: API key is required when AI Epsë is enabled.
settings.confirm_reset_all_body: This will clear all saved soviet — including your API keys. This cannot be undone, O my brothers.
settings.unsaved_body: You have unsaved changes to your AI soviet. What would you like to do, my droog?
settings.reduced_motion_note: You have reduced motion turned on — we viddy that system setting. Animations like confetti will be skipped, O my droog.
settings.wcag_filter_desc: Filter findings by the WCAG version and conformance level you're auditing to, O my droog.
error.announce: Bolshy strack — the finding library could not be loaded. Check your connection, O my droog.
error.heading: Something Went Bolshy Wrong
error.body: The finding library could not be loaded, O my brothers. Check your connection and
notfound.heading: 404 — Lost in the Milk Bar
notfound.body: This page doesn't exist, O my droog. Let's smot back to the start.
party.announce_full: Ultra-violence mode activated, O my brothers! The font has changed to Comic Sans. The colors have changed to a real horrorshow bright palette. Colorful confetti is now falling. The mouse cursor is now a magic wand.
party.announce_reduced: Ultra-violence mode activated! The font has changed to Comic Sans. The colors have changed. Confetti was skipped — we viddy your reduced motion setting.
kofi.title: Ko-fi donation widget
results.copy_link_aria: [EN] Copy link to these search results
search.hint_pin: [EN] Pin any result to keep it at the top across all views.
about.feature_pinning_body: Pin any finding to keep it at the top across all searches and views. Use the priority arrows to rank others, star to float a finding to the very top, or archive to remove it from view.
settings.pinned_results_desc: Items you've pinned appear above all search results.
settings.agentic_mode_desc: AI will search your corpus to match your style and technical depth when rewriting.
detail.agentic_mode_help: AI searches the corpus to match your style and depth when rewriting
detail.agentic_mode_hint: AI will search the corpus to match your established style and technical depth
common.sponsored_body: Krieg Reklam vun Bedrieven ut de Barrierefrieheit- un Entwickler-Gemeinschappen. Dien Privatsphäre warrt respektiert, keen Verfolgung, keen Profilen, keen Algorithmen.
onboarding.heading: Willkamen bi A11yFred
onboarding.confirm_body: Du hest dat Enn vun de Tour noch nich raakt. Nu sluten un den Rest överspringen?
onboarding.slide_1_body: Beschriev, wat du beobacht hest: en Komponentennaam, en Symptom oder en WCAG-Erfolgskriterium. Bruuk de Filter för Plattform un WCAG-Nivel, üm den Corpus intogrenzten. Bruuk Enge Resultaten, üm binnen dat al Vishowt intofillern. Resultaten warrt na Relevanz sortiert, denn na Swaat.
onboarding.slide_2_body: Bruuk Rang Hoch/Dal, üm Resultaten na Wichtigkeit to rangeren. Markeer en Befund as Favuriet, üm em ümmer eerst to wiesen. Heft en Befund fast, üm em bi all Söken bovenop to holen.
onboarding.slide_3_body: Maak en Befund open, üm sien Titel, WCAG-Kriterium, Beschrievung un Vörslag för Verbeterung to sehn. Füg en Steed-Vörsilb to de Beschrievung to (z. B. 'Global:'). Bruuk AI Assist, üm jeed Feld mit dien Notizen to revideern, denn kopeer Felder enkelt oder bruuk Allns koperen, üm allens op eenmal to griepen.
search.hint_platform_native_caveat: De Afdeckung vun Native-Apps is mehr begrenzt as bi Webseiten.
search.hint_ranking: Bruuk Rang Hoog/Dal, üm de Sorteerung vun de Resultaten antopassen. Sterner een Resultat, üm dat alltieds eerst to wiesen.
search.hint_syntax_prefix: Bruuk +Woort, üm en Woort vörtoschrieven, un -Woort, üm een uttosluuten (z.B.
search.narrow_clear_and_reset_aria: Ingrensen-Filter wegsmieten un na de vull Sööch torüchkehren
search.view_all_confirm_pinned_one: 1 Resultat is vastnagelt un alltieds anwiest.
search.view_all_confirm_pinned: {count} Resultaten sünd vastnagelt un alltieds anwiest.
search.view_all_confirm_starred_one: 1 is sternt un warrt alltieds bovenaan wiest.
search.view_all_confirm_starred: {count} sünd sternt un warrn alltieds bovenaan wiest.
search.view_all_confirm_archived_one: 1 is archiviert un warrt alltieds am Enne vun de Resultatenliest wiest.
search.view_all_confirm_archived: {count} sünd archiviert un warrn alltieds am Enne vun de Resultatenliest wiest.
search.view_all_confirm_body_one: Dat warrt 1 Resultat op disse enkelt Siet wiesen.
results.sort_live_hint: Live-Söök is an. De Ergebnisse warrt direktemang sorteert, wenn du wat ingifft oder en Utwahlwessels mååkst.
results.summary_query: Ergebnisse för '{query}', sorteert nå '{sort}', enschränkt op '{narrow}', {platform}.
results.sort_smart_info: De sluke Sorteern ordert eerst nå Swårheit, denn nå dien persönlichen Rangscore. Markeerde Iendrääg kamt jümmer baven; archivieerde Iendrääg kamt jümmer unnen. Dat is de standardmääßige Sorteerordnung.
results.sort_wcag_level_info: AAA-Kriterien hebbt en seloktive Ünnerstütten in düssen Corpus. Nich alle AAA-Erfolgskriterien sünd vertreeten, un enkeld Iendrääg, de as AAA markeerd sünd, köönt Best-Practice-Anleitungen weergeven in Steed von strikte Konformitätsziele.
results.sort_popularity_info: In en tökamen Update warrt dat de aggregeerte globale Populariteit op Basis von Bruukerinteraktionen över alle Konten weddergeven. Vöreerst is de Populariteit sitzungsbaseerd un warrt torüchsett, wenn du de App slüttst.
results.rank_hint: Resultaten na baven oder na ünnen ranken, um de Sorteerordnung antopassen. Stern, um bovenst to wiesen. Archiv, um to versteken. (Kann rückgängig maakt warden.)
results.unpin_from_search: Dit Resultat is vastpinnt. Loslösen, üm dat in de Söökresultaten optonehmen.
detail.discard_confirm_body: Wenn en nieg Funnen openmaakt ward, warrt dat infolten Panel un alle unopslagen Ännern verwörpen.
detail.ai_revision_hint: Wählt ut, welke Felder du ännern wullt, mit de Kontrollkastens baven, dooto diene Notizen hier hen, un de AI schrifft disse Felder nu. To den AI-Model ännern oder dat utstellen, gah na
detail.finding_note_hint: Füüg hier Kontext tokamen: Standort, Anmerkungen to de Swere oder wat projektspezifisch is. Schakel AI Assist an in
detail.finding_note_hint_suffix: un dat ward op Basis vun dien Notizen neeschreven.
detail.ai_revision_placeholder: z.B. dat is speziell för Mobil, Element is en Tooltip
detail.finding_note_placeholder: z.B. Kritische Swaarheit, dörch den ganzen Onboarding-Fluss funnen. Weniger swoare Problemen köönt to'n Vörschien kamen, wenn disse fixt sünd.
detail.ai_revision_aria: AI-Anwisungen speichern un utsöchte Felder revideern
detail.ai_revision_error_body: Dat is wat schiefgahn bi't Överarbeiden. Drück op Speichern & Utwählte överarbeiden, um dat nochmal to versöken.
detail.ai_revision_error_invalid_key: Ungültig oder utlopen API key ({provider}). Kontroller dien Slötel in de Instellen.
detail.ai_revision_error_rate_limit: Anfragelimiet bereikt ({provider}). Wacht even un probeer dat nochmal.
detail.ai_revision_error_service_error: {provider} Deenstfehler ({status}). Versöök dat na en poor Sekunnen noch mal.
detail.ai_revision_error_network_error: Keen Internetverbinnen. Prüf dien Verbinnen un versöök dat nochmal.
help.take_tour_description: Spell de Onboarding-Tour noch mal af, üm to kieken, wo A11yFred fungschoneert.
help.step_1_body: Resultaten verschient, wiel du schrievst. Bruuk den Plattform-Filter in de Instellungen, um Web- oder Native-App-Befunde uuttosöken (de meisten sünd op Web utricht). Bruuk +Wurd, um en Wurd vörtoschrieven, un -Wurd, um een uttosluuten (b. B. keyboard +screen reader -wcag2.2).
help.step_2_body: Elk Resultat hett Buttons to dat Rang hoochsetten un runnersetten. Steern en Resultat, so dat dat ümmer as eerste verschient. Pinnen en Resultat, so dat dat bi all Söken böven blifft.
help.step_3_body: Wähl den Fund ut, de am besten to dat passt, wat du opmerkt hest. De Ergebnisse sünd eerst na Relevanz sortiert, denn na Swaarheit.
help.step_4_body: Föög en Standortpräfix to de Beschrieven (z.B. 'Global:' oder 'Cart:'). Wenn AI Assist an is, föög dien Noten in dat Veld Revisioonsnoten in un de AI schrifft den Fund passend to dien Kontext üm.
help.step_5_body: Kopeer de Beschrieven un den vörslaan Fix in dien Tabellenblatt oder Bericht. Bruuk "Allens kopeern" üm beid Felder op eenmal to griepen.
help.shortcuts_note: Tastenkörtels sünd blots aktiv, wenn de Focus op de Resultatenliest liggt. Bruuk se, üm Bevunden flott to navigeren un to bewerten, ahn de Liest to verlaten.
help.shortcut_s: S = Aktuell Resultat mit en Steern markeren
about.what_body_2_prefix: De sülven Probleme kamt op fast jede Siet vör. Dit Töög höllt diene Beschrievungen konsistent över Rapporte henweg, so dat du nich jedes Mal vun vörn anfangen musst. De Bibliothek wöör ut echte Audit-Arbeit opboot un denn mit AI för klore Spraak, Konsistenz, Nauwkämigkeit un Faktenprüfung gegen
about.feature_agentic_body: Wenn du Claude (Anthropic) bruukst, kannst du ok Match Existing Style aktiveren. De AI sökt in vergangen Revisioons-Bispelen, um den Ton un de Deepde, de du al faststellt hest, to passern – un schrifft den aktuellen Fund nich blots för sik alleen um.
about.examples_ath010_label: Stüerwark-Beschrifting beschrifft dat Utsehen, nich den Zweck
settings.party_confirm_body: De Saak warrt gliek bannig schräg un mööglich nich toegänglich.
settings.pending_save_note: {unsaved} Drück op de Knoop {save} to'n Anwenden.
settings.language_rhg_body_1: Disse Översettung is von AI maakt worrn un is noch nich von natieven Rohingya-Snackers nakeken worrn.
settings.language_rhg_body_2: Dat Rohingya-Volk hett Völkermord un twungen Verdrieven dörmaken müsst. Bruuk disse Översettung mit Bedacht, un överlegg, ob du Verbeterungen bidregen kannst, wenn du dat vermöchst.
settings.platform_all_desc: All Resultaten över Web, native Apps un Dokumente wiesen.
settings.ranking_on: De Rankingsteuerung is bi jedes Resultat sichtbar.
settings.starred_results_desc: Markeerde Punkte kamt jümmer na baven, in de Reehenfolg, in de se markeerd worrn sünd.
settings.archived_results_desc: Archiveerde Punkte verschient jümmer ganz ünnen bi de Resultaten.
settings.rankings_desc: Rangorden, de du Resultaten hooch- oder runnersett hest. Je höger en Resultat rangordeert is, desto eerder wiset dat sik in de Söök.
settings.confirm_reset_all_intro: Dat kann nich rüchgängig maakt warrn.
